consumer.honesty_note: recurrence = 관측 재발률(exact 아님). defect_id = sha256(family‖type‖normalized-location) best-effort — normalized-location 안정성 무보장. self-ref candidate = heuristic(substrate 에 Story-purpose↔family alignment 부재) — general recurrence(기계) 와 분리 라벨, ground-truth 아님.

schema_note: dev-process-selfref-recurrence-v1 (de-facto local KPI schema, NOT inter-plugin contract)

stats.honesty_note: read-time dedup 은 event_id 우선(부재 시 row-hash) best-effort — JSONL write-time UNIQUE 부재. rows_total/rows_deduped/duplicates_collapsed = 관측치, exact-count/guaranteed-unique 아님. 본 port 는 raw rows 만 — 집계(B)/verdict(C) 미산출.

tier_honesty: [measurement] tier STRICT — dev-process 지표는 관측치일 뿐 인과/verdict 아님. measured-0 ≠ dormant(미측정). exact-count/guaranteed-unique 주장 금지(port 관측치 상속).

substrate gap → honest-degrade: transition_point/anchor_id/root_cause_class/origin-lane 부재. cycletime=coarse residency, should-have-caught=advisory heuristic, pattern_count=uncomputable(default), token-cost=honest-null(3-gap). null+uncomputable_reason 로 표기, fabricated 0 금지.
